title: Nlow-lichen
description: Lichen is invisible to stop players mixing it up with diamonds.
body:
Makes glow lichen invisable. This prevents people from mistaking glow lichen for diamonds. If you install this pack glow lichen will be invisable no matter where it is even in your inventory. This is a very useful quality of life pack.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
